deploy_actions.tag: gh workflow run release.yml -f version=X.Y.Z -f action=tag
deploy_actions.publish: gh workflow run release.yml -f version=X.Y.Z -f action=publish
deploy_actions.rollback: gh workflow run release.yml -f version=X.Y.Z -f action=rollback

notes: Factory deploys as a tagged release, not a running service. No alpha or staging environments. The release workflow handles version bumping, tagging, and marketplace updates via PRs. Publish and rollback require production environment approval.
